chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4023 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 04.03.2025 Mr. Naeem Suleman, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Bilquees Khalid and another vs. Federation of Pakistan and another reported as 2022 CLC 2002, therefore, in reliance upon the ratio therein may be disposed off upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
